queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating impact of a checking account status indicating no checking account on consumer loan default probability.
Determinants of default: empirical investigation into how loan duration in months correlates with reduced credit risk and lower default likelihood.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers: empirical study on how a checking account status with a balance below zero DM influences borrower default probability and serves as a protective factor in lending.
